title: Graph DFS — Reachability
description: Given an undirected graph and a source node s, find all nodes reachable from s using DFS. Output them in increasing order.
inputSpec: First line: n (nodes, 0-indexed) and m (edges). Next m lines: u v. Last line: s.
outputSpec: All nodes reachable from s in increasing order, space-separated.

botCodes.code:
import sys
sys.setrecursionlimit(10000)
n,m=map(int,input().split())
g=[[] for _ in range(n)]
for _ in range(m):
    u,v=map(int,input().split())
    g[u].append(v);g[v].append(u)
s=int(input())
vis=[False]*n
def dfs(u):
    vis[u]=True
    for v in g[u]:
        if not vis[v]:dfs(v)
dfs(s)
print(*[i for i in range(n) if vis[i]])
